tasks.title: Write the Adversarial RLS Test
tasks.prompt: Write a complete Vitest test that proves RLS workspace isolation works. The test must: set workspace context to workspace B, attempt to query workspace A's pages, and assert 0 rows are returned. Include a second test that proves workspace B's own pages ARE visible.
success_criteria: Uses SET LOCAL or set_config to set context to workspace B
Queries pages WHERE workspace_id = workspaceA UUID
Second test sets context to workspace B, queries workspace B's pages, asserts length > 0

tasks.title: Write the sanitizeMemoryValue Function
tasks.prompt: Write the TypeScript sanitizeMemoryValue function. It must: remove common injection phrases, enforce a maximum length of 500 characters, and be applied to all memory values before they are injected into a system prompt.
